description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of HTML5 semantic elements versus generic tags, testing both basic markup recognition and deeper understanding of modern web standards. It is moderately challenging, using a casual, encouraging tone that nudges learners to improve their semantic HTML skills. The format blends humor with practical prompts to keep the experience engaging.
Topics: HTML5 semantic elements, Difference between generic tags (<div>, <span>) and semantic tags, Best practices for modern web markup
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and students who are comfortable with basic HTML and want to validate or deepen their HTML5 knowledge.
